title: 3 Idiots
synopsis: Two friends search for their long-lost companion. They revisit their college days and recall the memories of their friend who inspired them to think different.
notes: An absolute timeless masterpiece. Full of laugh-out-loud moments and great life lessons.

tasks.text: Add 'Give Me Some Sunshine' to favorite tracks list

title: Jawan 2
synopsis: An emotional journey of a man who is set to rectify the wrongs in society, taking the thrilling vigilante system to new heights.
notes: Eagerly waiting for official trailer and casting rumors confirmation.

tasks.text: Book IMAX tickets on first day of release
